2312950.name: The Legend Of Lorosity
2312950.description:
Experience a fantasy world with colorful environments, unique hand-drawn animations, and vibrant characters. Join Vyron and Lumeya as they journey through vast lands, meet new friends, and find the Lorosity Stones to bring balance back to the universe!

Immerse yourself in the story with animated cutscenes.

Battle your way through enemies with style and magic! If you find yourself in a pinch, turn the tides of battle using Defend Boost!

Defend Boost allows you to activate different battle enhancements such as-
• Increasing Attacking Power
• Repelling status effects
• Increasing Critical Hit Rate
